meaning: n.供应者,补充者,厂商,供给者
examples: The equipment can be purchased from your local supplier.
A supplier wants to get in on the ground floor and grow with the business.
They struck a deal with their paper supplier, getting two years of newsprint on credit.
Start by playing detective and kick some tires at a supplier s plant or warehouse.
So how do you know if your best supplier or customer is about to hit the skids?
